title: Algoritmi e democrazia, il caso Meta secondo lo studio di UniUrb
snippet: This press article highlights how Fabio Giglietto's scientific findings on Meta's algorithm shifts led to an official investigation at the European Parliament level, detailing the subsequent media fallout from a RAI 3 investigative journalism show.
description: An article discussing the political and public fallout of Professor Giglietto's research on Meta's algorithms, including its feature on Rai3's 'Report' and subsequent European Parliament inquiries.

title: Facebook premia gli estremisti: la ricerca dell'Università di Urbino - Lumsanews

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme
snippet: This news article reports on a study led by Professor Fabio Giglietto demonstrating that Meta's political content reduction policy severely degraded the visibility of mainstream, institutional political figures while inadvertently driving higher visibility for extremist accounts on Facebook.
description: An article detailing a research study co-authored by Fabio Giglietto on how Meta's algorithmic changes affect the organic reach of political groups in Italy.

title: Il movimento religioso cinese che si è infiltrato in un gruppo Facebook urbinate - il Ducato
Researchers meet to discuss DSA access to publicly available platform data
snippet: A news announcement from the European Centre for Algorithmic Transparency (ECAT) under the European Commission. It reports on a working meeting where Fabio Giglietto is featured as a key member of a selected group of European experts collaborating on research regarding systemic risks, civic discourse, and platform transparency under the Digital Services Act (DSA).
description: An official news release by the European Centre for Algorithmic Transparency (ECAT) naming Fabio Giglietto as part of an expert group collaborating on platform data access under the Digital Services Act.
